content:
🚀 WireTapper | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: Passive wireless reconnaissance and signal intelligence gathering for OSINT and security analysis.
✨ Key Features: • Passively detects Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, CCTV cameras, vehicles, headphones, TVs, IoT devices, and cell towers • Maps and analyzes radio signals for situational intelligence • Identifies leaked Wi-Fi network credentials using k-Anonymity
📖 Summary: WireTapper is a wireless OSINT and signal intelligence platform that passively detects, maps, and analyzes radio signals from various devices like Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cameras, vehicles, and IoT appliances. It aims to provide situational intelligence by understanding the invisible wireless landscape without active intrusion.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
